welcome.title:
Be prepared.
Stay calm.
welcome.description: A safety coordination app that helps families and supporters organize a search quickly.

timer.title: 15-Minute Timer
timer.description: Guided search protocol with step-by-step checklist

readout.title: 911 Ready
readout.description: One-tap script with all critical info for dispatchers

privacy.title: 100% Private
privacy.description: All data stays on your device. No accounts needed.

welcome.privacy: Your information never leaves this device.

theme.title: Choose your look
theme.subtitle: Select how you'd like the app to appear. You can change this later in Settings.

name.title: Who are you caring for?
name.subtitle: This name will be used when calling 911 and alerting your circle.
name.nicknameHint: What name do they respond to best?

photo.title: Add a recent photo
photo.subtitle: A clear, recent photo is critical for neighbors and first responders to identify them
photo.tip: 💡 Tip: Use a photo from the last 3-6 months that shows their face clearly.
photo.webCameraUnavailable: Taking a photo is only available in the mobile app. Please use "Choose from Library" on web.

appearance.title: Physical description
appearance.subtitle: This helps 911 and searchers identify them. Be as specific as possible.
appearance.marksPlaceholder: Tattoos, scars, birthmarks, glasses, hearing aids...

contact.title: Emergency contact
contact.subtitle: Who should we notify if they wander? You can add more contacts later.

infoBox.title: What happens in an emergency?
infoBox.body:
• You'll have a one-tap button to text this contact
• They'll receive the person's photo and last known location
• You can add neighbors and family later

complete.title: You're ready!
complete.description: You have the essential information set up. In an emergency, tap the big button on the home screen to start the guided search.
